keyFeatures.zh: 创作者的视频编辑工具

description.en: Basic editing tools, limited storage, no watermarks
description.zh: 基础编辑工具，有限的存储空间，无水印

description.en: Advanced editing tools, unlimited storage, watermarks
description.zh: 高级编辑工具，无限存储空间，有水印

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

weaknesses.en: No clear pricing for premium features
weaknesses.zh: 高级功能的定价不明确

positioning.en: Flixier positions itself as a user-friendly video editing platform for creators and small businesses.
positioning.zh: Flixier 定位为面向创作者和小型企业的用户友好型视频编辑平台
